name: Extract references to connected devices
description: Examine artifacts and extract indicators of devices that have been connected to the target device.
details: This technique extracts references to other devices that have potentially been connected to the device being examined. The subsequent interpretation of these artifacts (using T1088: Relational-based event reconstruction), could result in HypothesisedDevices. The separate process for inferring the connected device(s) captures the uncertainty in such an interpretation.

references.relevance_summary_280: Demonstrates extraction of synchronisation artefacts referencing connected devices across cloud services, mobile devices and computers. Directly supports DFT-1116 by showing how sync records serve as indicators of associated devices warranting further acquisition.

ALEAPP plugin implementing DFT-1116 for Android devices. Parses /misc/adb/adb_hosts to extract identifiers of computers previously connected via ADB, providing direct indicators of associated host devices for further investigation.
